pullRequest.title: [QE-15196] Added sleep to make sure we wait for the size to be calculated

nodes.body:
```suggestion
      And I wait up to "{CHANGE_ME}" seconds to see the following steps succeed
      """
      When I refresh the browser
      Then I wait to see the text "The allowed storage quota across all Datasets that you own in one or more projects is almost reached. Check notifications for more details."
      """
```
Great solution, thank you so much!!!!
